config-backup.name: Config Backup
config-backup.summary: Backs up OpenClaw config to Git with SHA-256 change detection

fastmail.name: FastMail tools
fastmail.summary: Send email and manage calendar events in Fastmail

github.name: GitHub
github.summary: Manage GitHub issues. Create, read, update, close, comment on, and list issues.

homeassistant.name: Home Assistant
homeassistant.summary: Control devices, query state, and inspect activity in Home Assistant

html-to-pdf.name: HTML to PDF
html-to-pdf.summary: Convert HTML files to PDF using Chromium headless

ics-calendar.name: ICS Calendar
ics-calendar.summary: Fetch upcoming events from a published ICS calendar feed

llmvision.name: Home Assistant – LLM Vision
llmvision.summary: Home Assistant LLM Vision integration: analyze camera images with AI, query the vision timeline, and create timeline events.

md-to-html.name: Markdown to HTML
md-to-html.summary: Convert styled Markdown reports to HTML using a CSS template

octo-satellite.name: Octo Satellite
octo-satellite.summary: OpenClaw toolset providing structured access to the Octo Satellite service. Exposes Amazon order management and Monarch Money financial tools.

outlook-calendar.name: Outlook Calendar
outlook-calendar.summary: Fetch upcoming events from Outlook personal and family calendars

outlook-mail.name: Outlook Mail
outlook-mail.summary: Search and read messages from Outlook inboxes

outlook-work-calendar.name: Outlook Work Calendar
outlook-work-calendar.summary: Fetch upcoming events from a published Outlook work calendar

package-tracking.name: Package Tracking
package-tracking.summary: Track packages from UPS, FedEx, USPS, and Amazon

restaurant-cli.name: restaurant-cli
restaurant-cli.author: OmarShahine
restaurant-cli.summary: Pluggable reservation booking via Resy, OpenTable, Tock, and other providers

spotify.name: Spotify
spotify.summary: Control Spotify playback, search music, and manage playlists

stock-quotes.name: Stock Quotes
stock-quotes.summary: Fetch current stock, ETF, and mutual fund quotes

usps-mail.name: USPS Mail Analyzer
usps-mail.summary: Analyze USPS Informed Delivery digest emails: parse mailpiece scans, vision-classify, apply rules, write memory, send notifications

weightwatchers.name: WeightWatchers
weightwatchers.summary: Search foods, log meals, view diary and points budget via the unofficial WW API

browser.name: Browser
browser.summary: Browser automation capability used when the assistant needs to inspect or act on live web pages.

github-copilot.name: GitHub Copilot
github-copilot.summary: Provider integration that lets the instance use GitHub Copilot-hosted models.

google.name: Google
google.summary: Provider integration for Gemini models and Google-powered web search features.

glances.name: Glances
glances.summary: Read CPU, memory, disk, and summary metrics from a Glances server

withings.name: Withings
withings.summary: Fetch health data from Withings devices (weight, body composition, heart rate, sleep, activity)

obsidian-vault.name: Obsidian Vault
obsidian-vault.summary: Read-only access to an Obsidian vault — search, read, and explore notes securely

screenshot-capture.name: Screenshot Capture
screenshot-capture.summary: Capture screenshots from paired nodes, write to gateway media store

onedrive-sync.name: OneDrive Sync
onedrive-sync.description: Keeps the Obsidian vault and other files synced to Microsoft OneDrive via the abraunegg/onedrive Linux client

obsidian-indexer.name: Obsidian Vault Indexer
obsidian-indexer.description: Long-running indexer that maintains a SQLite FTS5 index of the Obsidian vault for full-text search

fastmail-sse.name: FastMail SSE Service
fastmail-sse.description: Real-time email notification daemon using JMAP EventSource

octo-satellite.name: Octo Satellite
octo-satellite.description: Local secrets broker providing credentialed access to Amazon and Monarch Money without exposing passwords or session cookies to the gateway

config-watchdog.name: Config Watchdog
config-watchdog.summary: Watches openclaw.json and auto-recovers the gateway if a bad config is detected — rotating backups, recovery ladder, and GitHub incident filing.

calendar-fetch-hourly.summary: Refreshes the local calendar memory files that calendar briefings and reminder jobs rely on during the day.

config-backup.summary: Runs the config-backup plugin to commit OpenClaw configuration changes to git and report failures.

evening-briefing.summary: Reads the synced calendar snapshots and sends a short Discord briefing about tomorrow's schedule.

portfolio-closing-briefing.summary: Pulls closing prices for Jeff's portfolio and sends a concise end-of-day market summary.

evening-alarm-reminder.summary: Checks for early work meetings or late-night/early-morning conflicts and warns Jeff to adjust plans or alarms.

Daily package delivery check.summary: Reviews tracked packages for today's deliveries or notable updates and removes delivered items.

daily-health-check.summary: Sends a daily test email to verify outbound mail is healthy and alerts Jeff only if the send fails.

WW Daily Points Check-in.summary: Checks WeightWatchers daily and weekly points and sends the remaining budget to Jeff.

late-early-conflict-morning-check.summary: Looks for late meetings today plus early meetings tomorrow and flags the conflict early enough to reschedule.

Lobster changelog weekly scan.summary: Scans the Lobster changelog for new ideas worth adopting and reports only when something changed.

calendar-fetch-midnight.summary: Performs the same calendar sync overnight so the next day starts with fresh memory snapshots.

ww-diet-sync.summary: Runs the nightly WeightWatchers diet sync script from the main-agent workspace.

Log rotation - openclaw.log.summary: Runs copy-truncate rotation for the main OpenClaw log and keeps a bounded archive set.

plugin-health-check.summary: Daily smoke test that calls one tool from every configured plugin and reports pass/fail to Discord.

weekly-cost-report.summary: Generates a weekly LLM API cost report, renders it to PDF, posts to Discord, and commits the artifacts.

usage-summary-weekly.summary: Aggregates weekly LLM usage metrics across all providers into a summary report.

openclaw-upgrade-readiness-check.summary: Checks for new OpenClaw releases and evaluates whether an upgrade is safe based on changelog and config compatibility.

Nightly browser recycle.summary: Restarts the headless Camoufox browser instance overnight to reclaim memory and clear stale sessions.

calendar-fetch.summary: Runs a shell script to sync calendar data from all configured providers without using LLM tokens.

finance-daily-snapshot.summary: Captures a daily snapshot of portfolio holdings and account balances.

agent-review-weekly.summary: Scans session transcripts, tool failures, and memory files for patterns; deduplicates recurring findings via fingerprint state, auto-files guarded GitHub issues, and delivers a prioritized weekly report via Discord DM.

late-early-conflict-benchmark.summary: Benchmark variant of the late-early conflict check for testing.

waitlistme.name: waitlistme
waitlistme.summary: Join a Waitlist.me queue from the command line

hass.name: Home Assistant Events
hass.summary: Receives HA automation webhooks (motion, camera/LLMVision detections, doorbell) and responds with camera collage analysis via Discord

notify.name: LAN Notify Relay
notify.summary: Relays notifications from LAN services directly to Discord DM without interpretation
